productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Off White T-shirt
description: Composition Off white polo T-shirt, made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, chest placket, brand name and logo embroidered on the left chest and has a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or dry flat in shade Warm iron Get ready for the monsoon in this feminine top from scullers For women. The ribbed neckline and ribbed sleeves give it a dainty look. This top looks great when teamed with a simple black skirt or jeans and ballerina flats for a day out with friends. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
